steps.title: Write the area equation
steps.content:
Area is length times width, so
$$x(x-12)=85$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
Move all terms to one side and factor:
$$x^2-12x-85=0$$
$$(x-17)(x+5)=0$$

steps.title: Choose the positive length
steps.content: The possible values are $x=17$ and $x=-5$. A rectangle length must be positive, so $x=17$. The answer is B.
